user_query: I want to surprise my family with a spontaneous road trip to Yosemite National Park. Can you give me a 120-hour forecast for the park? Additionally, suggest some hiking trails and scenic spots we shouldn't miss.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a 120-hour weather forecast for Yosemite National Park.
Identify popular hiking trails in Yosemite National Park.
Locate scenic spots in Yosemite National Park that are recommended for visitors.
